mapper.sql: videos.id, videos.user_id, videos.gym_id, videos.gym_grade_id, u.nickname, u.profile_image, g.name AS gym_name, gg.label AS gym_grade_label, gg.difficulty_order AS gym_grade_difficulty_order, videos.title, videos.description, videos.gcs_path, videos.gcs_streaming_path, videos.thumbnail_path, videos.duration_seconds, videos.recorded_date, videos.file_size_bytes, videos.mime_type, videos.view_count, videos.like_count, videos.comment_count, videos.status, videos.is_public, videos.created_at, videos.updated_at, videos.deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO videos (user_id, gym_id, gym_grade_id, title, description, gcs_path, gcs_streaming_path, thumbnail_path, duration_seconds, recorded_date, file_size_bytes, mime_type, status, is_public) VALUES (#{userId}, #{gymId}, #{gymGradeId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{gcsPath}, #{gcsStreamingPath}, #{thumbnailPath}, #{durationSeconds}, #{recordedDate}, #{fileSizeBytes}, #{mimeType}, #{status}, #{isPublic})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM videos JOIN users u ON u.id = videos.user_id JOIN gyms g ON g.id = videos.gym_id JOIN gym_grades gg ON gg.id = videos.gym_grade_id AND gg.gym_id = videos.gym_id WHERE videos.id = #{id} AND videos.deleted_at IS NULL

sql.if: AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_blocks WHERE blocker_id = #{viewerId} AND blocked_id = videos.user_id )

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM videos WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND gym_id = #{gymId}
mapper.update: UPDATE videos SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE videos SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE videos SET like_count = GREATEST(0, like_count - 1) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE videos SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE videos SET comment_count = GREATEST(0, comment_count - 1) WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE videos
title = #{title}, description = #{description}, is_public = #{isPublic}, gym_id = #{gymId}, gym_grade_id = #{gymGradeId}, recorded_date = #{recordedDate}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE videos SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE videos SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
